LanguageData.VPEMYX_Message_VoidAscension_UndraftedOn: Void Ascension can only be cast while undrafted.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_Message_VoidAscension_AlreadyComp: This pawn has already completed Void Ascension.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_Message_VoidAscension_AlreadyInPr: Void Ascension is already in progress.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_Message_VoidAscension_NoAssault: The void stirs, but no entity assault could be formed on this map.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_Message_VoidAscension_Began: Void Ascension has begun. The caster collapses into a prolonged metamorphic coma.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_Message_VoidAscension_Completed: {0} has completed Void Ascension and become a Void Avatar.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_Message_AbyssalBirth_MissingDefs: Abyssal Birth failed: missing sacrifice or result pawn definition.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_Message_AbyssalBirth_NotEnoughSac: Abyssal Birth requires {0} allied Lord of Legion sacrifices, but only {1} were found.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_Message_AbyssalBirth_SpawnFailed: Abyssal Birth failed: could not spawn Abyssal Atrocity.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_Message_AbyssalBirth_Success: The sacrifice is complete. The Abyssal Atrocity enters reality.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_Message_DomainOfSilence_MissingCh: Domain of Silence is missing its channel hediff definition.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_Message_DomainOfSilence_Cancelled: Domain of Silence channel cancelled manually.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_Message_DomainOfSilence_Started: Domain of Silence unfolded. You must channel in place while technological firepower is suppressed.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_Message_DomainOfSilence_MovedColl: Domain of Silence collapses because the caster moved.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_Message_DomainOfSilence_DownedInt: Domain of Silence was interrupted because the caster was downed.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_Message_DomainOfSilence_NoEntropy: The caster can no longer maintain the entropy circuit. Domain of Silence ends.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_Message_DomainOfSilence_EntropyOv: Entropy exceeded 80%. Domain of Silence collapses automatically.
Entropy circuit overload forced Domain of Silence to terminate.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_Message_DarkBeacon_MissingChannel: Dark Beacon is missing its channel hediff definition.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_Message_DarkBeacon_Closed: Dark Beacon closed: the rift is sealed and summoned entities are banished.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_Message_DarkBeacon_Opened: Dark Beacon opened: remain in place to channel while the void tide surges in.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_Message_DarkBeacon_InterruptedMov: Dark Beacon interrupted: the caster left the anchor point.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_Message_DarkBeacon_InterruptedDow: Dark Beacon interrupted: the caster was downed and the rift destabilized.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_Message_DarkBeacon_NoEntitiesAvai: Dark Beacon: no valid entities are currently available to emerge from the rift.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_Message_MindSiphon_InvalidTarget: Target must be a living, downed, hostile humanlike pawn.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_Message_FleshMolding_NotEnoughMat: Flesh Molding needs at least {0} materials. Current: {1}.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_Message_FleshMolding_NoResultKind: Flesh Molding failed: no result pawnkind configured.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_Message_FleshMolding_GenerationFa: Flesh Molding failed: pawn generation failed.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_Message_PsychicScream_Result: Scream of Despair affected {0} hostiles (hostiles in range: {1}, no mood: {2}).
